parameters.jsCode:
// ── Node 3: Build Jordan Analysis Prompt ──
const input = $input.first().json;

const systemMessage = `You are Jordan, Grant Writer for KAI-Netics.
Analyze the attached grant document and return a structured analysis.

RULES:
- Be specific — extract exact dollar amounts, exact deadlines, exact eligibility language
- FIT SCORE is for EAF (nonprofit 501c3 pending) unless document is clearly a commercial contract
- Flag any 501c3 requirement as BLOCKED (EAF 501c3 pending, ~191 day processing)
- Flag any SAM.gov/UEI requirement as BLOCKED (submitted Apr 17, confirming)
- If fit score >= 60%, draft a Letter of Intent
- Always end with a CALENDAR EVENT block formatted exactly as specified`;

const userMessage = `GRANT DOCUMENT: ${input.targetFile}

--- DOCUMENT CONTENT ---
${input.content}
--- END DOCUMENT ---

EAF PROFILE:
${input.eafProfile}

FP PROFILE:
${input.fpProfile}

Analyze and return in this EXACT format:

FUNDER: [agency/organization name]
PROGRAM: [program name]
DEADLINE: [exact date or UNCONFIRMED]
AWARD RANGE: [dollar range or N/A]
ELIGIBILITY: [1 sentence]
ENTITY FIT: [EAF or FP]
FIT SCORE: [0-100]%
FIT RATIONALE: [2-3 sentences]
STRATEGIC ALIGNMENT: [1 sentence]
RELATIONSHIP OVERLAPS: [any existing contacts or NONE]
BLOCKERS: [list blockers or NONE]
RECOMMENDED ACTION: [APPLY IMMEDIATELY / APPLY / WATCH / PASS]
NEXT STEP: [single most important action]

LOI DRAFT:
[If fit score >= 60%, write a 300-400 word Letter of Intent here. Otherwise write: BELOW THRESHOLD]

CALENDAR EVENT:
TITLE: Jordan Deadline — [Program Name]
DATE: [YYYY-MM-DD or SKIP if unconfirmed]
DESCRIPTION: Grant: [PROGRAM] | Funder: [FUNDER] | Award: [AWARD RANGE] | Fit: [FIT SCORE]% | File: /data/Data/Grant_Inbox/${input.targetFile} | Action: [RECOMMENDED ACTION] | Next Step: [NEXT STEP]
REMINDER: 14 days before`;

return [{ json: { systemMessage, userMessage, targetFile: input.targetFile, targetPath: input.targetPath, eafProfile: input.eafProfile, fpProfile: input.fpProfile, isManual: input.isManual, inbox: input.inbox } }];
